response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse full-stack experience, particularly in Linux, TypeScript, and architecture design — aligning well with technical requirements. However, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1), he lacks explicit project leadership or team management experience, and his resume lacks clear evidence of IT consulting, client advisory, or UML modeling — all critical for this executive-level role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with Linux and open tech stack
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and architectures
Strong track record in technical mentoring and workshop leadership
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not C1 as required
No clear evidence of client advisory, IT consulting, or project leadership experience
Missing explicit UML, requirements management, or security/compliance expertise
